name: Freedom Limousine Inc

name: T & M Limo Svc
districts_or_customers: Historical: North Chicago Community Unit School District (via predecessor T&M Transportation / Safety First Transportation)
recent_news: Listed on Yelp as 'T & M Boddie Limousine Service' in Gurnee. Owner Tommie Boddie has a documented federal criminal history tied to a North Chicago school bus contract kickback/fraud scheme (T&M Transportation / Safety First Transportation, sentenced for fraud; DOJ release). Tommie Boddie now listed as a Site Coordinator at Olson Transportation (Gurnee).
fit_notes: DISQUALIFY for Summit tuck-in. Principal has documented federal conviction tied to a school district bus-contract kickback scheme; reputational/regulatory risk is unacceptable for an I Squared-backed platform. Also too small (5 employees, no apparent bus fleet).

name: Bens Executive Cars Inc
